title: Movie gif. Wearing a tuxedo, Leonardo DiCaprio toasts to us with a glass of white wine and a complicated smile. A large celebration with fireworks and a ferris wheel goes on behind him.
Peanuts gif. Cast of characters shout for joy in a living room while colorful balloons fall down from the ceiling. Banner in the background reads, "Happy New Year!"
TV gif. Comedian Rob Huebel of Children's Hospital throws a handful of metallic confetti into the air in a dramatic, fluttering cloud.
Text gif. Text on white background: Happy New Year. The words flash with various colorful images of fireworks.
Illustrated gif. Against a yellow background, two champagne flutes with tiny smiley faces on them leap up and clink together.
Feeling 22 Taylor Swift GIF by BrittDoesDesign
Peanuts gif. Snoopy wears a striped party hat and puts his whole body into blowing on a party horn, levitating as the horn blows.

TV gif. Jennifer Coolidge as Tanya McQuoid in "The White Lotus" is wearing a gold-speckled black chiffon veil over her head on a swaying boat. She awkwardly cracks a smile as she raises a glass of champagne and says "Wee-hee!"
New Year Pink GIF
TV gif. Lucille Ball from I Love Lucy dressed in a fancy gown and flashy jewelry, excitedly and haphazardly pouring champagne over glasses and the table.
